headline: A Look At Republic Services (RSG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Mixed Returns
summary: Share Performance Snapshot and Recent Returns Republic Services (RSG) has been on investors’ radar after recent share price moves, with the stock closing at $209.79 and showing mixed return patterns over the past week, month, and past 3 months. Over the past day the stock recorded a 1.99% decline, while the past week shows a 1.03% gain. Returns for the past month and past 3 months reflect declines of 2.80% and 4.24% respectively, with year to date performance roughly flat. Looking further...
